sentenceTheme: Deborah and Barak sing praise to the LORD for Israel’s deliverance, recounting God’s mighty acts, the tribes’ responses, Jael’s deed, and the downfall of Sisera.

verses.text: Then sang Deborah and Barak the son of Abinoam on that day, saying,

highlightedWords.meaning: bee; a prophetess and judge of Israel
lightning; an Israelite commander under Deborah

verses.text: Praise ye the LORD for the avenging of Israel, when the people willingly offered themselves.

highlightedWords.meaning: the divine name, the God of Israel
God strives; the people/nation of Israel

verses.text: Hear, O ye kings; give ear, O ye princes; I, even I, will sing unto the LORD; I will sing praise to the LORD God of Israel.

highlightedWords.meaning: the divine name, the God of Israel
God strives; the people/nation of Israel

verses.text: LORD, when thou wentest out of Seir, when thou marchedst out of the field of Edom, the earth trembled, and the heavens dropped, the clouds also dropped water.

highlightedWords.meaning: Seir; a rugged mountain region in Edom
Edom; ‘red,’ the nation descended from Esau

verses.text: The mountains melted from before the LORD, even that Sinai from before the LORD God of Israel.

highlightedWords.meaning: the divine name, the God of Israel
Sinai; the sacred mountain where the law was given

verses.text: In the days of Shamgar the son of Anath, in the days of Jael, the highways were unoccupied, and the travellers walked through byways.

highlightedWords.meaning: Jael; ‘mountain goat,’ wife of Heber
days; a period of time

verses.text: The inhabitants of the villages ceased, they ceased in Israel, until that I Deborah arose, that I arose a mother in Israel.

highlightedWords.meaning: God strives; the people/nation of Israel
bee; a prophetess and judge of Israel

verses.text: They chose new gods; then was war in the gates: was there a shield or spear seen among forty thousand in Israel?

highlightedWords.meaning: God/gods; mighty ones, deities
God strives; the people/nation of Israel

verses.text: My heart is toward the governors of Israel, that offered themselves willingly among the people. Bless ye the LORD.

highlightedWords.meaning: God strives; the people/nation of Israel
the divine name, the God of Israel

verses.text: Speak, ye that ride on white asses, ye that sit in judgment, and walk by the way.

highlightedWords.meaning: she-asses; female donkeys
way; road, path, manner

verses.text: They that are delivered from the noise of archers in the places of drawing water, there shall they rehearse the righteous acts of the LORD, even the righteous acts toward the inhabitants of his villages in Israel: then shall the people of the LORD go down to the gates.

highlightedWords.meaning: the divine name, the God of Israel
God strives; the people/nation of Israel

verses.text: Awake, awake, Deborah: awake, awake, utter a song: arise, Barak, and lead thy captivity captive, thou son of Abinoam.

highlightedWords.meaning: bee; a prophetess and judge of Israel
lightning; an Israelite commander under Deborah

verses.text: Then he made him that remaineth have dominion over the nobles among the people: the LORD made me have dominion over the mighty.

highlightedWords.meaning: the divine name, the God of Israel
mighty; a strong or valiant one, warrior

verses.text: Out of Ephraim was there a root of them against Amalek; after thee, Benjamin, among thy people; out of Machir came down governors, and out of Zebulun they that handle the pen of the writer.

highlightedWords.meaning: Ephraim; ‘double fruitfulness,’ a tribe of Israel
Zebulun; ‘habitation,’ a tribe of Israel

verses.text: And the princes of Issachar were with Deborah; even Issachar, and also Barak: he was sent on foot into the valley. For the divisions of Reuben there were great thoughts of heart.

highlightedWords.meaning: Issachar; ‘there is recompense,’ a tribe of Israel
Reuben; ‘see, a son,’ a tribe of Israel

verses.text: Why abodest thou among the sheepfolds, to hear the bleatings of the flocks? For the divisions of Reuben there were great searchings of heart.

highlightedWords.meaning: Reuben; ‘see, a son,’ a tribe of Israel
heart; inner person, mind, will

verses.text: Gilead abode beyond Jordan: and why did Dan remain in ships? Asher continued on the sea shore, and abode in his breaches.

highlightedWords.meaning: Dan; ‘judge,’ a tribe of Israel
Asher; ‘happy/blessed,’ a tribe of Israel

verses.text: Zebulun and Naphtali were a people that jeoparded their lives unto the death in the high places of the field.

highlightedWords.meaning: Zebulun; ‘habitation,’ a tribe of Israel
Naphtali; ‘my wrestling,’ a tribe of Israel

verses.text: The kings came and fought, then fought the kings of Canaan in Taanach by the waters of Megiddo; they took no gain of money.

highlightedWords.meaning: Canaan; the land/people of Canaan
Megiddo; a place in the Jezreel Valley

verses.text: They fought from heaven; the stars in their courses fought against Sisera.

highlightedWords.meaning: Sisera; commander of Jabin’s army
heaven; sky, heavens

verses.text: The river of Kishon swept them away, that ancient river, the river Kishon. O my soul, thou hast trodden down strength.

highlightedWords.meaning: Kishon; ‘winding,’ a river in the Jezreel Valley
river; stream

verses.text: Then were the horsehoofs broken by the means of the pransings, the pransings of their mighty ones.

highlightedWords.meaning: hoof; the hoof of an animal
mighty; a strong or valiant one, warrior

verses.text: Curse ye Meroz, said the angel of the LORD, curse ye bitterly the inhabitants thereof; because they came not to the help of the LORD, to the help of the LORD against the mighty.

highlightedWords.meaning: messenger; angel
the divine name, the God of Israel

verses.text: Blessed above women shall Jael the wife of Heber the Kenite be, blessed shall she be above women in the tent.

highlightedWords.meaning: Jael; ‘mountain goat,’ wife of Heber
Kenite; a member of a nomadic clan allied with Israel

verses.text: He asked water, and she gave him milk; she brought forth butter in a lordly dish.

highlightedWords.meaning: water; waters
milk

verses.text: She put her hand to the nail, and her right hand to the workmen's hammer; and with the hammer she smote Sisera; she smote off his head, when she had pierced and stricken through his temples.

highlightedWords.meaning: hand; power, control
Sisera; commander of Jabin’s army

verses.text: At her feet he bowed, he fell, he lay down: at her feet he bowed, he fell: where he bowed, there he fell down dead.

highlightedWords.meaning: to bow; kneel
to fall; collapse

verses.text: The mother of Sisera looked out at a window, and cried through the lattice, Why is his chariot so long in coming? why tarry the wheels of his chariots?

highlightedWords.meaning: Sisera; commander of Jabin’s army
chariot; war chariot

verses.text: Her wise ladies answered her, yea, she returned answer to herself,

highlightedWords.meaning: wise; skillful, experienced
to answer; respond

verses.text: Have they not sped? have they not divided the prey; to every man a damsel or two; to Sisera a prey of divers colours, a prey of divers colours of needlework, of divers colours of needlework on both sides, meet for the necks of them that take the spoil?

highlightedWords.meaning: Sisera; commander of Jabin’s army
spoil; plunder, prey

verses.text: So let all thine enemies perish, O LORD: but let them that love him be as the sun when he goeth forth in his might. And the land had rest forty years.

highlightedWords.meaning: the divine name, the God of Israel
sun
